hash_bundle.controls_v3_csv_note: controls loaded from t7b_params.committed_controls (materialized from committed stage01_controls_v3.csv)

input_h5ad.canonical_content_status: ARCHIVED Phase-1 diagnostic — pre-flight rule 2 (input_manifest @ 6d75944): NOT a current verified hash; its canonicalization is not fully specified / not independently reproducible this session. Identity is pinned by raw_sha256, NOT this value.

bins_source: stage01_bins_v3.csv (committed frozen bins, LOADED not recomputed)

integrity.primary_score_check_rule: pre-flight rule 1 (input_manifest @ 6d75944): recomputed scores rounded to 5dp then compared for EXACT equality to emitted parquet; inclusive fallback abs_error <= 5e-6

overlay_release.note: overlay gates block OVERLAY RELEASE ONLY, never program selectability

preflight_corrections.rule1_score_integrity: recomputed scores rounded to 5dp (frozen rule) then compared for EXACT equality to emitted parquet; inclusive tolerance abs_error <= 5e-6 if used; engineering correction, not a gate change
preflight_corrections.rule2_identity_hash: raw h5ad sha 2edc6d31 is authoritative byte-exact identity; canonical 4ba50ccd DEMOTED to ARCHIVED Phase-1 diagnostic (not a current verified hash)
preflight_corrections.nature: pre-flight engineering corrections applied BEFORE results; no threshold/seed/panel/overlay change

field_semantics.stage1_selectable_by_condition: driven only by stage-1 measurement-validity HARD gates (global_coverage, condition_measurability, lomo_panel_robustness, control_draw_sensitivity); undefined metric = fail
field_semantics.stage2_base_portability: SEPARATE; effect-universe portability; never gates stage-1 measurement validity
field_semantics.advisory_flags: pair_redundancy, off_axis_association, donor_sensitivity are advisory RECORDS ONLY; never a selection block or program failure
field_semantics.stage2_selectable: NOT set here (owner decision at T8)

results.note: structural gate applied at selection time (T8); not a T7b data metric
